title: Vanilla+ Layers
description: Mod adding layers (stackable two pixels tall blocks) to the game.
body:
![Vanilla+ collection image ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfa83c3ccb92f7b64845d30ad633f8952b18d43.png)
## GENERAL
**Vanilla+ Layers** Mod adds layer blocks (two pixel tall blocks you can stack up to 8 layers) to almost every block in Minecraft. This mod is part of the [Vanilla+ Mod Collection](https://modrinth.com/organization/vanilla+-collection) covering most of the content of Vanilla Minecraft.

## OTHER MODS
[![Vanilla+ Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ad69b0410d742a168319c8c6cd9a7bb5ba1801.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla+-blocks)
[![Vanilla+ Signs & Boats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d9b668eeff9205054447328c7bf3d773a9fdf2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla+-signs-and-boats)
[![Vanilla+ Verticals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ad319661af8b8f5cd7a7b7755dcfdfc313dfe7.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla+-verticals)
